title: WorldSnapshot
description: NOT a Kafka event — the shared-state contract for the Redis key world:{villagerId}. Written by minecraft-service every 1s with a 10s TTL; read by agent-service's perceive node. Shared state drifts silently without a schema; this one is validated in minecraft-service tests like any event.

timeOfDay.description: Minecraft ticks: 0 = dawn, 6000 = noon, 13000 = dusk, 18000 = midnight.

nearbyAnimals.description: Huntable animal families in tracking range (additive, survival cluster). Computed on the 1s snapshot pass UNGATED — an entities-map filter, ~1000x cheaper than one findBlocks sweep, and animals move while bots stand still. Absent when the feature is off; empty when nothing is in range.

family.description: A huntable family the hunt action accepts (cow/pig/sheep/chicken).

nearbyHostiles.description: Hostile mobs in alert range (additive, survival cluster), from the threat watcher's cached pass — zero extra scanning. Absent when the watcher is off; empty when the night is quiet.

nearbyResources.description: Gatherable resource families in range (additive, M2-2). Refreshed on its own ~5s cadence — deliberately staler than the 1s snapshot (findBlocks scans are the cost). The scan is biased to the villager's altitude band, so entries lean reachable; count saturates at the scan cap. Absent (not empty) when no scan has run yet.

family.description: A resource family the gather action accepts (wood/stone/dirt).

count.description: Blocks seen, capped by the scan — read 'at least'.
